popularStory.headline: Edmund of Woodstock, 1st Earl of Kent (5 August 1301-19 March 1330)
popularStory.description: Edmund of Woodstock, 1st Earl of Kent (5 August 1301-19 March 1330) was the sixth son of Edward I of England, and a younger half-brother of Edward II. Edward I had intended to make substantial grants …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund of Woodstock 1st Earl of Kent於1301年8月5日出生在英國奧可福爾武德斯托可時，他的父親Edward I King of England62歲，母親Marguerite Capet de France Queen of England21歲。他於大約1325年與Margaret Wake結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1330年3月19日在英國哈普爾維古姆享年28歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭米德萊可維斯特明斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund of Woodstock 1st Earl of Kent于1301年8月5日出生在英国奧可福爾武德斯托可时，他的父亲Edward I King of England62岁，母亲Marguerite Capet de France Queen of England21岁。他于大约1325年与Margaret Wake结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1330年3月19日在英国哈普爾維古姆享年28岁，埋葬在英国英格兰米德萊可維斯特明斯特。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Woodstock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Middlesex and Hertfordshire): habitational name from Woodstock in Oxfordshire, or Woodstock in Tunstall (Kent). The placenames derive from Old English wudu ‘wood’ + stoc ‘place’.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund of Woodstock 1st Earl of Kent was born on 5 August 1301, in Woodstock, Oxfordshire, England, his father, Edward I King of England, was 62 and his mother, Marguerite Capet de France Queen of England, was 21. He married Margaret Wake about 1325. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 19 March 1330, in Winchester, Hampshire, England, at the age of 28, and was buried in Westminster, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund of Woodstock 1st Earl of Kent est né le 5 août 1301, à Woodstock, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Edward I King of England, avait 62 ans et sa mère, Marguerite Capet de France Queen of England, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Wake environ 1325. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 19 mars 1330, à Winchester, Hampshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 28 ans, et a été enterré à Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund of Woodstock 1st Earl of Kent am 5. August 1301 in Woodstock, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edward I King of England 62 und seine Mutter Marguerite Capet de France Queen of England 21. Er hat um 1325 Margaret Wake geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 19. März 1330 im Alter von 28 Jahren in Winchester, Hampshire, England und wurde in Westminster, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Margaret Wake circa 1325. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. ko.lifeSummary: Edmund of Woodstock 1st Earl of Kent(이)가 1301년 8월 5일 영국 스퍼드실르 우드스톡에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward I King of England(은)는 62세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite Capet de France Queen of England(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1325년 Margaret Wake(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1330년 3월 19일 영국 함프실르 윈체스터에서 28세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 웨스트민스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund of Woodstock 1st Earl of Kent nasceu em 5 de agosto de 1301, em Woodstock, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edward I King of England, tinha 62 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite Capet de France Queen of England, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Wake aproximadamente 1325. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de março de 1330, em Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, com 28 anos, e foi sepultado em Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Marlborough Castle, Marlborough, Wiltshi: марлбороую ст питир анд ст поул, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund of Woodstock 1st Earl of Kent родился 5 августа 1301 г. в местности вудстокк, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Edward I King of England было 62 года, а матери, которую звали Marguerite Capet de France Queen of England, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Wake около 1325 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 19 марта 1330 г. в местности винчестир, хампшир, Англия в возрасте 28 лет и был похоронен в местности вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmund of Woodstock 1st Earl of Kent nació el 5 de agosto de 1301, en Woodstock, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Edward I King of England, tenía 62 años y su mamá, Marguerite Capet de France Queen of England, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Margaret Wake aproximadamente 1325. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 19 de marzo de 1330, en Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 28 años, y fue sepultado en Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
